OTP read packet FIFO — read once per byte until rd_last asserts

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x18
Size:
0x4
Source:
otpc_rf.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:13] - - - -
[12] rd_valid r 0x0 1 = rd_data contains valid data
[11:9] - - - -
[8] rd_last r 0x0 1 = this is the last byte of the requested burst
[7:0] rd_data r 0x0 read data byte
